channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jennie Is on a Chic Streak at New York Fashion Week, Plus Jane Fonda, Kerry Washington, Dakota Johnson and More
item.description: From New York City to Los Angeles, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Anthony Hopkins Played Hannibal Lecter with 'Great Relish,' Said It Was 'Easy' to Step into Role as Terrifying Killer
item.description: “Maybe it's in the genes,” Hopkins told PEOPLE in a March 1991 interview

item.title: Keke Palmer Shares Her Son's Most Recent Milestone, and What Motherhood Has Taught Her (Exclusive)
item.description: Palmer is mom to Leodis "Leo" Andrellton, 2, whom she shares with her ex-boyfriend, Darius Jackson

item.title: Bad Bunny Sparks Rumors He’s Back with Ex Gabriela Berlingeri After Pair Step Out for Dinner Together
item.description: The Grammy winner and jewelry designer quietly went their separate ways in late 2022

item.title: See the Cast of “Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette” Side-by-Side with the Real People They Play
item.description: John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette’s romance is the subject of a new FX limited series

item.title: Karol G Hot Shots for Her 35th Birthday!
item.description: Karol G's soaking up the sun -- and our attention -- in these sexy shoreline shots for her 35th birthday! The singer-songwriter's celebrating another ...

item.title: Celebrity Heart Hands For Valentine's Day
item.description: Love is in the air and the famous folks of Hollywood are here to spread the vibes ❤️! K-Pop idol Jennie Kim knows how to celebrate the day, showin' of...

item.title: Drew Brees Says Eli Manning, Philip Rivers Will Be Hall of Famers
item.description: Drew Brees earned his spot in the 2026 NFL Hall of Fame class ... and he tells TMZ Sports he believes it's only a matter of time before fellow quarter...

item.title: FBI Investigates Possible Vehicle of Interest in Nancy Guthrie Search
item.description: Federal agents in Arizona may have snagged another crucial lead in the search for Nancy Guthrie ... because cops were seen poking around a potential v...

item.title: Astrologer Predicts the Futures of the Biggest Celebrity Super Bowl Romances
